prompt: A surreal, cinematic scene where two separate groups of people are climbing upward on two different sloped paths, each group clearly ascending higher and higher, but when viewed from a wider perspective the entire landscape is tilted downward, creating the illusion that overall they are descending, dramatic lighting, realistic environment, strong perspective distortion, visually paradoxical composition, no text, no labels, no charts, no symbols
visual_logic: Two groups individually move upward, but the global perspective reveals an overall downward trend, reflecting reversal between subgroup and aggregate patterns.
